    unfold circleAverage

    apply MeasureTheory.set_integral_congr (by simp)
    intro y hy
    rw [norm_sub_rev]

have eq : ∀ a ∈ sphere (0:ℂ) 1, logCounting f a r =
        circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖f z - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖ := by
      intro a _
      rw [logCounting_coe_eq_logCounting_sub_const_zero]
      have h_sub : Meromorphic (fun z ↦ f z - a) := h.sub (by fun_prop)
      have eq₁ := logCounting_zero_sub_logCounting_top_eq_circleAverage_sub_const h_sub hr
      rw [logCounting_sub_const h] at eq₁
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at eq₁
      rw [eq₁]
      abel
    apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := fun a ↦ circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖f z - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖)
    · apply CircleIntegrable.sub
      · apply CircleIntegrable.add
        · exact ρx hr h.meromorphicOn h₂
        · exact circleIntegrable_const _ _ _
      · apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := 0)
        · exact circleIntegrable_zero
        · intro a ha
          simp
          have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
            have : (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f := by ext; simp; ring
            rw [this, ← meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_const]
            apply MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt
            · refine meromorphicAt_of_meromorphicOrderAt_ne_zero ?_
              rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const]; simp; intro c; rw [c] at ha; simp at ha; exact ha
            · rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const]; simp [ha]; exact h₂
          rw [this, norm_neg, mem_sphere_zero_iff_norm.mp ha, Real.log_one]
    · intro a ha; exact eq a ha

have key : ∀ a, logCounting f a r = circleAverage (fun x ↦ log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r 
        + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖ := by
      intro a
      rw [logCounting_coe_eq_logCounting_sub_const_zero]
      have h₁ : Meromorphic (fun z ↦ f z - a) := h.sub (MeromorphicOn.const a ⊤)
      have := logCounting_zero_sub_logCounting_top_eq_circleAverage_sub_const h₁ hr
      rw [logCounting_sub_const h] at this
      simp at this
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at this
      rw [this]
      ring
    apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := fun a ↦ circleAverage (fun x ↦ log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - 0)
    · apply CircleIntegrable.sub
      · apply CircleIntegrable.add
        · apply ρx hr h h₂
        · apply circleIntegrable_const
      · apply circleIntegrable_zero
    · intro a ha
      simp at ha
      rw [key]
      simp
      have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
        have : (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f := by ext; simp; ring
        rw [this]
        rw [MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt]
        · exact meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_const
        · refine meromorphicAt_of_meromorphicOrderAt_ne_zero ?_
          simp
          exact h₂.ne'
        · rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const]
          simp_all
          refine (MeromorphicNFAt.meromorphicOrderAt_eq_zero_iff ?_).mpr ?_
          · refine meromorphicNFAt_iff_analyticAt_or.mpr ?_
            left
            fun_prop
          · simp_all
          · exact h₂
      rw [this, norm_neg, ha, Real.log_one]

apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := fun a ↦ circleAverage (fun x ↦ log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖)
    · intro a ha
      specialize f1 (a := a)
      rw [← f1]
      simp
    · apply CircleIntegrable.sub
      · apply CircleIntegrable.add
        · apply ρx hr (h.meromorphicOn) h₂
        · apply circleIntegrable_const
      · apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := 0)
        · intro a ha
          simp at ha
          have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
            rw [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
            apply MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt
            · exact meromorphicAt_const _ _
            · exact h.meromorphicAt
            · rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const]
              simp [ha]
              exact h₂
          rw [this]
          simp [ha]
        · exact circleIntegrable_zero 0 1

have eq : ∀ a, a ∈ sphere 0 1 → logCounting f a r =
        circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖f z - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖ := by
      intro a ha
      rw [eq_sub_iff_add_eq, add_comm, f1]
    unfold CircleIntegrable
    apply IntervalIntegrable.congr_fun (g := (fun a ↦ circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖f z - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖) ∘ circleMap 0 1)
    · apply IntervalIntegrable.sub
      · apply IntervalIntegrable.add
        · have := ρ₃'' (r := r) (f := f) (fun x _ ↦ h x)
          rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff'] at this
          rcases this with ⟨_, h_int⟩
          dsimp [circleAverage]
          apply IntervalIntegrable.smul
          exact h_int.intervalIntegrable
        · apply intervalIntegrable_const
      · apply IntervalIntegrable.congr_fun (g := fun _ ↦ 0)
        · apply intervalIntegrable_const
        · intro θ hθ
          dsimp
          have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - (circleMap 0 1 θ)) 0 = -(circleMap 0 1 θ) := by
            have : (fun x ↦ f x - (circleMap 0 1 θ)) = (fun _ ↦ -(circleMap 0 1 θ)) + f := by ext; simp; ring
            rw [this]
            apply MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt
            · exact meromorphicAt_const
            · rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const]
              simp only [Ne, if_false]
              exact h₂
              simp
              exact circleMap_ne_zero _ (by norm_num) _
          rw [this]
          simp only [norm_neg, norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs_abs, Real.log_eq_zero]
          left
          exact circleMap_mem_sphere 0 1 θ
    · intro θ hθ
      dsimp
      rw [eq]
      exact circleMap_mem_sphere 0 1 θ

unfold CircleIntegrable
    refine IntervalIntegrable.congr (g := fun t ↦ circleAverage (fun x ↦ log ‖f x - circleMap 0 1 t‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r) ?_ ?_
    · filter_upwards with t
      have h_ne : circleMap 0 1 t ≠ 0 := by simp; norm_num
      rw [logCounting_coe_eq_logCounting_sub_const_zero,
          logCounting_zero_sub_logCounting_top_eq_circleAverage_sub_const (h.sub (Meromorphic.const _)) hr,
          ← logCounting_sub_const f _ h]
      have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - circleMap 0 1 t) 0 = -circleMap 0 1 t := by
        rw [show (fun x ↦ f x - _) = (fun _ ↦ _) + f by ext; simp; ring]
        refine MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt (meromorphicAt_of_meromorphicOrderAt_ne_zero (by simpa using h₂)) ?_
        rwa [meromorphicOrderAt_const _ h_ne]
      simp [this]
    · apply IntervalIntegrable.add
      · exact ρx hr h h₂
      · exact intervalIntegrable_const
rfl
rfl

refine CircleIntegrable.congr ?_ (fun a ha ↦ ?_)
    · refine (ρx hr h.meromorphicOn h₂).add (circleIntegrable_const _ _ _) |>.sub ?_
      refine CircleIntegrable.congr (circleIntegrable_zero) (fun a ha ↦ ?_)
      simp only [norm_neg, mem_sphere_iff_norm, Complex.norm_eq_abs, Pi.zero_apply] at ha ⊢
      have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
        refine MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt ?_ ?_
        · simpa using (h 0).meromorphicAt
        · simpa [meromorphicOrderAt_const] using h₂
      simp [this, ha]
    · simp only
      rw [logCounting_coe_eq_logCounting_sub_const_zero, logCounting_sub_const (h := h)]
      have h_sub : Meromorphic (fun z ↦ f z - a) := h.sub (Meromorphic.const a)
      have := logCounting_zero_sub_logCounting_top_eq_circleAverage_sub_const h_sub hr
      simp only [Pi.sub_apply, Pi.add_apply] at this ⊢
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at this
      rw [this]
      ring

unfold circleAverage intervalIntegral
    simp

apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := fun a ↦ circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖f z - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖)
    · refine CircleIntegrable.add (ρx hr (fun z _ ↦ h z) h₂) ?_
      refine CircleIntegrable.sub (circleIntegrable_const _ _ _) ?_
      refine (circleIntegrable_const (0 : ℝ) 0 1).congr (fun a ha ↦ ?_)
      simp only [Pi.zero_apply]
      have ha_norm : ‖a‖ = 1 := dist_zero_right.symm.trans ha
      have ha_ne_zero : a ≠ 0 := norm_ne_zero_iff.mp (by rw [ha_norm]; exact one_ne_zero)
      have : (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f := by ext; simp; ring
      rw [this, MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt]
      · simp [ha_norm, norm_neg]
      · exact meromorphicAt_const
      · exact h 0
      · rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const]; simp [ha_ne_zero]; exact h₂
    · intro a ha
      rw [logCounting_coe_eq_logCounting_sub_const_zero]
      have h_sub : Meromorphic (fun z ↦ f z - a) := h.sub (by fun_prop)
      have key := logCounting_zero_sub_logCounting_top_eq_circleAverage_sub_const h_sub hr
      have : logCounting (f · - a) ⊤ = logCounting f ⊤ := by
         have : (f · - a) = f - fun _ ↦ a := rfl
         rw [this, logCounting_sub_const h]
      rw [this] at key
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at key
      rw [key]
      abel

have key : ∀ (a : ℂ), a ≠ 0 →
      logCounting f a r =
        circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖f z - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r -
          log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖ := by
      intro a ha
      have h_sub : Meromorphic (fun z ↦ f z - a) := h.sub (by fun_prop)
      have tmp := logCounting_zero_sub_logCounting_top_eq_circleAverage_sub_const h_sub hr
      rw [logCounting_coe_eq_logCounting_sub_const_zero]
      have : logCounting (fun z ↦ f z - a) ⊤ = logCounting f ⊤ := by
        rw [← logCounting_sub_const (c := a) h]
        rfl
      rw [this] at tmp
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at tmp
      rw [tmp]
      abel
    apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := fun a ↦ circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖f z - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0‖)
    · intro a ha
      have : a ≠ 0 := by intro h; rw [h] at ha; simp at ha
      exact key a this
    · apply CircleIntegrable.sub
      · apply CircleIntegrable.add
        · exact ρx hr h.meromorphicOn h₂
        · exact circleIntegrable_const _ _ _
      · apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := fun _ ↦ 0)
        · intro a ha
          simp at ha
          have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
             have : (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f := by ext; simp; ring
             rw [this]
             apply MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt
             · rw [meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_const]
             · refine meromorphicAt_of_meromorphicOrderAt_ne_zero ?_
               aesop
             · rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const]; simp; exact h₂
          rw [this, norm_neg, ha, Real.log_one]
        · exact circleIntegrable_const _ _ _
